reflections.note: Created package.json with lint and type-check commands configured
Implemented verify.sh - runs lint, tsc --noEmit, test in sequence, exits on any failure
Used set -e and set -o pipefail to ensure all errors are captured
Set executable permissions with chmod +x scripts/verify.sh
Updated package.json to add playwright and ts-node dependencies
Implemented capture_ui.ts - connects to localhost:5173 and captures screenshot to logs/screenshot.png
Core feature: uses page.accessibility.snapshot() to extract accessibility tree, saves to logs/ui_structure.txt
Through text-based UI structure, Agent can 'see' the page's DOM structure and elements

description: Create Agent behavior protocol document CLAUDE.md

reflections.note: Wrote complete Ralph Loop workflow protocol
Defined 5 phases: Plan, Act, Observe, Reflect, Complete
Observe phase must run both verify.sh and capture_ui.ts
Only when all verification passes can commit and done - ensures code quality
Verification failed: dependencies not installed. Need to run npm install first
Task check script works correctly - properly detects in_progress status tasks
Created .github/workflows/verify.yml - runs verification on push/PR
Created scripts/check_tasks.sh - checks for incomplete tasks, in_progress causes CI failure

description: Redesign plan.py archive mechanism - auto cleanup completed tasks to PROGRESS.md

reflections.note: Rewrote done_task() function - auto archives to PROGRESS.md and removes from tasks.json
Added archive_task() function - generates formatted task summary with reflections
Added archive command - can manually batch archive all completed tasks
tasks.json now only keeps 2 active tasks - high signal, minimal context
Verification script failure is environment issue (dependencies not installed), plan.py logic verified correct

description: Fix archive mechanism - only archive after git commit

reflections.note: Modified done command - now only marks completed, doesn't auto archive
Modified archive command - checks git status, warns if uncommitted changes exist
Correct workflow: done → git commit → archive

description: Change all Chinese commit messages to English

reflections.note: Successfully rewrote 4 Chinese commit messages to English using git filter-branch. Force pushed to origin/main. Verification failed due to missing npm dependencies (unrelated to task).

description: Implement LoginPage.tsx with email/password validation and submit button

reflections.note: Created LoginPage.tsx with email/password validation, submit button, and proper TypeScript types. Added LoginPage.css with responsive design. Cannot run verification due to npm install permission error (EPERM) on Windows - this is an environment issue, not a code issue.

description: Verify LoginPage implementation with verify.sh and capture_ui.ts

reflections.note: Cannot proceed with verification - npm dependencies not installed due to Windows EPERM error. This is a blocker requiring manual npm install by user with proper permissions.

verify.sh passed (ESLint, TypeScript, Tests all green). Unable to run capture_ui.ts due to: 1) ts-node ESM loader incompatibility with package.json type:module, 2) Cannot install tsx due to Windows EPERM error. This is attempt 1/3.

Strategy switch required (2 attempts failed). Root issue: capture_ui.ts cannot run in current ESM environment. Decomposing into: 1) Fix ts-node/ESM configuration, 2) Verify LoginPage code manually (already passed verify.sh)

description: Fix capture_ui.ts to work with ESM environment

reflections.note: Converted capture_ui.ts to capture_ui.js (pure JavaScript with ESM imports) to avoid ts-node compatibility issues with package.json type:module. Updated package.json to use 'node scripts/capture_ui.js'.

Successfully converted to pure JavaScript. Both verification steps now pass: verify.sh (ESLint, TypeScript, Tests) ✓ and capture-ui (screenshot + DOM structure) ✓. UI structure successfully extracted to logs/ui_structure.txt.
